title: Tekmeris: reproducible construction and auditing of social accounting matrices (edikit)
description: Open toolkit (edikit) and replication package for reproducible construction and auditing of social accounting matrices from official statistics. Includes the P001 working paper's complete pipeline: a cell-level audit of the 2019 South African SAM, a macro-controls audit of the IFPRI 2019 Kenya SAM, and benchmark-free macro-SAM generation for ESA-transmitting countries from the Eurostat API.
